Conejo Valley Orchid Society

Where Orchid
Passion Takes Root

A community of growers, collectors, and enthusiasts in the Conejo Valley — united by a shared love of the world's most extraordinary flowers.

Become a Member Upcoming Events
Our Mission

Cultivating a love of orchids — through community, culture, and the sharing of knowledge.

The objectives of the COS shall be to stimulate an interest in the collection, culture and appreciation of orchids; to foster and encourage culture, growing, hybridization and preservation of native and hybrid orchids; to disseminate information by exhibits, lectures and publications.

Monthly Newsletter
The COS
Newsletter
Stay in the Know

Monthly insights from the orchid community

Each month, our newsletter brings you recaps of recent meetings, upcoming events, flower displays, member orchid photos, judging results, and featured speaker announcements — everything happening in the COS community, delivered to your inbox.

On the Calendar

Join Us at Our
Next Gathering

April 13
Monthly Member Meeting
Westlake Village Town Hall · 7:00 PM

We gather the second Monday of every month — bring your blooming plants for display and judging, connect with fellow growers, hear from guest speakers, and take your chances in our plant raffle. Meetings are held at Westlake Village Town Hall at 7 PM. No meetings in August or December.

Grow with a community that shares your passion

Join a passionate group of orchid growers. Members enjoy monthly meetings, plant judging, our newsletter, and access to a wealth of growing resources.
